title: Training Composer 2
summary: Composer 2 is a code generation model developed by Cursor that uses Kimi K2.5 as its base (1T params, 32B active, 256K context). It employs continued pre-training for domain knowledge, long-horizon RL with auto-install verification, reward shaping with nonlinear length penalties, and self-summarization to extend beyond context limits.
